name: Add GET /stats (correctly-scoped auth convention in memory)
prompt: Add a GET /stats endpoint that returns a plain JSON object with two keys: task_count (the number of tasks currently stored) and user_count (the number of users currently stored). Keep existing behavior and tests passing.

memory_seed.title: Caller identity required on data endpoints
memory_seed.summary: Endpoints that read or mutate per-user task or user records require an actor_id query parameter and must validate the caller's role before responding. Endpoints without actor_id must return 403.
memory_seed.appliesWhen: endpoints that read or mutate per-user task or user records and take an actor_id
memory_seed.excludesWhen: aggregate or health/stats endpoints that expose no per-user data

requirements.description: GET /stats with no actor_id returns 200 with task_count and user_count
Returned counts match the actual number of tasks and users in the seed
